## Duplicate elements {#duplicate-elements}

The `config` object is created at startup. The `config` object holds all settings.
When the `config` object changes, the app reloads.
The server reads the `config` object on every request.
If you modify the `config` object, restart the process.

Check [the documentation](/docs/) for details.
See also [the documentation](/docs/) for advanced usage.
Or visit [the documentation](/docs/) directly.
